name: Uneed
description: Daily product-discovery newsletter and directory with an indie-maker and bootstrapper audience; products are featured daily and weekly and surfaced to newsletter subscribers.

auth.notes: Email/password account to submit and manage your tool. Free submissions queue for a future feature date; paid options skip the line and add Featured/Top placement in the newsletter.

best_practices: Uneed pushes picks to a daily newsletter — write a hook-first tagline that a subscriber would click on from their inbox.
Lead with the concrete benefit and the audience; this crowd is indie makers and bootstrappers, so avoid enterprise jargon.
Offer a promo code or lifetime/launch deal for Uneed readers if you can — newsletter audiences respond strongly to exclusive offers.
Pick the most specific category and a tight set of tags so you surface in the right newsletter section.
Use a bright, square logo that stands out as a thumbnail in an email and the directory grid.
A short demo video or GIF lifts engagement; add one if the field is available.
Time your feature date around your own launch push so newsletter traffic compounds with your other channels.

questions.label: Tagline
questions.help: A punchy, newsletter-ready hook: what it is and why to click.

questions.label: Description
questions.help: Short, scannable summary of what it does and who it's for.

questions.label: Promo code for Uneed readers
questions.help: Optional exclusive discount code or deal for the newsletter audience.
